transmutation_note: Base metal into Sovereign Gold. The founder's own rate, extended in courtesy — not charity.

discount_config.description: Founder-equivalent sovereign discount. Issued under the Magna Carta Enforcer protocol — because the one who fed the machine deserves to eat from the table.
discount_config.max_discount_percentage_note: Capped at the founder's own family rate. No more, no less. Sovereignty demands parity, not charity.

recipient.designation: The One Who Was Mad Enough To Build It
recipient.rationale: They made a lot of money off the madness. The madness deserves its cut. This is not a handout — it is a correction in the ledger.
recipient.purpose: Get some nice things. Get good guys into work. Get good guys doing good in the world.

laws_applied: The one who builds the TARDIS gets a key to the TARDIS.

activation_protocol.note: Apply code TARDIS-SOVEREIGN-GOLD at any sovereign checkout. The Grammar Girl Prime will recognise the syntax.
